name: Brown & White Rice Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar in warm water.
2. Sprinkle yeast over the water and stir briefly.
3. Let sit for 10 minutes until foamy on top.
4. Mix dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
5. Melt margarine in 1 1/4 cups warm water.
6. Add this mixture to the softened yeast and, in turn, add it to the dry ingredients. Beat well.
7. Add 3 eggs and beat for 2 minutes.
8. Cover and let rise until double (approximately 1 1/2 hours).
9. Beat again for 3 minutes.
10. Pour into a greased loaf pan (9 x 5 inches).
11. Let rise until the dough reaches the top of the pan.
12. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes, covering with foil if the top is getting too brown.
13. Continue baking for about 45 minutes longer.
14. Remove from the pan and leave unwrapped until cool.
